content: SvelteKit routing: filesystem-based, src/routes/display/+page.svelte creates /display route. Page options (prerender, ssr, csr) exported from +page.ts or +layout.ts. Current app has prerender=true, ssr=false in root layout.ts — all new routes inherit these; /display inherits without needing its own +page.ts. adapter-static requires all pages prerendered or fallback set. SPA mode: fallback page catches unprerendered routes. The app already uses fallback: '404.html'.
